families.title: MAGPIE SYS/03 / DOS operational interface
families.summary: Low-resolution orange-on-charcoal operational systems: radar sweeps, routing paths, terminal fragments, and continuously changing state.

families.title: Cassie / MAGPIE 8-bit interface
families.summary: A 320x240 archive instrument with active maps, signal panels, humanized cursor motion, and event-linked typing and audio.

families.title: Hi-fi dashboard
families.summary: A more detailed continuous work session built from embedded screens, archive routing, scanning, and spatially organized information.

families.title: Thermal behavioral cartography
families.summary: A sensor engine tracking distinct moving presences, overlap complexity, residual paths, target locks, and camera-driven audio.

families.title: FIELD STATION operational instrument
families.summary: The primary broadcast identity: operational header, rolling AB'S LOGS, shared procedural variables, and accumulated orange annotation.

families.title: 32-bit CRT display protocol
families.summary: A 4:3 low-resolution display layer with rounded-glass curvature, crisp bitmap typography, and a visible rolling exposure band.

families.title: Signal / conformal field instrument
families.summary: Flowing phosphor fields and orange relation lattices that measure, average, retain, and rebuild their own geometry.

families.title: P03B CHAMBER STATIC interface instrument
families.summary: A full-frame diagnostic instrument whose pressure, displacement, residue, anomaly, contour, and log modules share chamber state.

families.title: Modular MAGPIE workstation / painted-interface system
families.summary: Physical and digital interface windows arranged as reusable modules across installations, paintings, and gallery touch systems.

families.title: Archive / HARIL visualization interfaces
families.summary: Topographies of conversational pressure, threaded networks, braided structures, archive weather, and orange resonance accumulation.
